external_model_archives.access: Model archives may be temporarily public for audit; repository visibility is controlled by the owner and must be checked at the pinned revision below.

encoder_checkpoints.contents: PhoBERT, XLM-R, registered ablation, and low-resource checkpoints with histories and run manifests.
encoder_checkpoints.verification_note: Public metadata and file hierarchy were inspected on 2026-07-18. The repository contains encoder, ablation, and low-resource run directories; weights remain external to Git.

sailor_7b_qlora.contents: Sailor-7B QLoRA adapters and run metadata.
sailor_7b_qlora.verification_note: Public metadata and file hierarchy were inspected on 2026-07-18. The repository exposes adapter and per-seed archive directories.

vistral_7b_qlora.contents: Vistral-7B QLoRA adapters and run metadata.
vistral_7b_qlora.verification_note: Public metadata and file hierarchy were inspected on 2026-07-18. The repository exposes adapter and per-seed archive directories.

access_notes: No access token, secret, raw checkpoint, or adapter weight is committed to this repository.
Pinned Hugging Face revisions identify the externally stored checkpoints and adapters without committing weights or credentials.
Raw social-media text remains subject to the repository's data-governance and source-permission terms.
